Based on your interest in financing solutions for a home purchase in the CAD $700,000 to $850,000 range, here’s an overview of a couple of tailored mortgage options that could be well-suited to your situation in Toronto:

1. Traditional Mortgage:
   • LTV: Typically available up to 80%.

   • Interest Rates: Competitive market rates that usually fall in the range of 3.5% to 4.5% (subject to credit and market conditions).
   • Loan Terms: Flexible terms available – common options include 20 to 30-year amortization.
   • Fees: A standard arrangement fee (CAD $1,200) applies, along with other closing costs.
   
2. First-Time Buyer Mortgage:
   • LTV: Often available up to 90%, allowing for a smaller down payment.
   • Down Payment: As low as 10% thanks to government schemes promoting home ownership.
   • Interest Rates: Might secure slightly better rates due to government incentives – typically also around the 3.5% to 4.5% range.
